title: Iran says ambassador to Lebanon to remain despite expulsion order
summary_full: The trigger for the stand-off was the ambassador's statement that any Lebanese effort to disarm Hezbollah should be reversed
summary_public: The trigger for the stand-off was the ambassador's statement that any Lebanese effort to disarm Hezbollah should be reversed
